title: Reaction Chains
description: A partial encyclopedia article lists three ingredients on the same aspect. Use the supporting clues to identify the fourth.

hints.text: The article on the G aspect has three known entries: ingredients [3, 7, 8] all have G+. There are exactly 4 alchemicals with G+. The fourth must be one of: [1, 2, 4, 5, 6]. Use the other clues to eliminate candidates.

Eliminate candidates:
  — ingredient 1: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 2: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 4: survives
  — ingredient 5: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 6: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
Only ingredient 4 remains. It is alchemical PPP, which has G+. It is the missing fourth entry.
